scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 21 artifact directory against the repository artifact validator.

scenarios.name: Validator — April 21 scenario difficulty
scenarios.description: Validated the Over the Top board difficulty and the required-new-plant condition (node-side simulator).
scenarios.details: `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-21` reports `Canonical result: WIN • wall 1 • clear 01:31 • endless 00:25 • resources left 69`, `Required new plant check: PASS • cottonburrMortar`, and `Verdict: near-perfect. Small timing/lane mistakes usually lose.`

scenarios.name: Playwright — April 21 day-detail artifact validation
scenarios.description: Verifies the published day-detail route renders the decision data, raw artifact links, inline spec section, and adjacent-day navigation for April 21, and that the homepage recent-days list links to the day.
scenarios.details: `npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.js tests/uiux/day-detail-2026-04-21-artifacts-validation.spec.js` — 2 passed. The April 21 manifest entry has been restored so the homepage timeline and adjacent-day navigation surface the day again.

scenarios.name: Playwright — tutorial → challenge → endless gating
scenarios.description: Asserts the title scene keeps Endless gated before clear, the tutorial rolls into the live April 21 challenge, the challenge roster includes Cottonburr Mortar and excludes Bramble Spear, and Endless unlocks only after a deterministic clear.

scenarios.name: Playwright — responsive shell and Board Scout layout
scenarios.description: Verified the April 21 game shell and Board Scout stay readable at mobile, tablet, and desktop sizes, including the Cottonburr card and `Arc 1.2s` badge.

scenarios.name: Playwright — scripts/replay-2026-04-21-mortar-clear.json browser replay
scenarios.description: Replays the checked-in canonical clear fixture against the live browser runtime and expects the challenge to clear into endless.
scenarios.details: `npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.js tests/uiux/game-2026-04-21-replays.spec.js` — 3 passed. The rewritten 14-action fixture (coordinateBase 0) front-loads the col-0 Thorn Vine wall (rows 1–4) with a corner Sunroot Bloom, triples lanes 1 and 2 with Thorn Vine + Amber Wall stacks, and places Cottonburr Mortar at (1, 3) at `atMs: 72000`. The board clears into endless with one wall HP remaining, matching the node-side validator's canonical `WIN`.

notes: Post-repair: the April 21 canonical-clear fixture was regenerated as a 14-action actions[]-format replay that reproduces the validator-reported clear in Chromium. All six scenarios now pass, the April 21 entry has been restored to `site/days/manifest.json` as `status: "shipped"`, and the day-detail route renders end-to-end.
